title: Korbond Precision Dressmaking 9 inch – Soft Grip Professional, Household, Fabric, Paper Scissors. Ambidextrous – for Right & Left Handed
features: SIZE: Korbond Dressmaking Scissors are 9 Inches in length, or 22cm
PRECISION BLADES: Precision stainless steel ground blades provide a sharp and accurate finish, preventing pulling or draying of fabric when cutting, and guaranteed to cut right to the tip.
AMBIDEXTROUS: Ambidextrous handles offer comfortable grip, suitable for both left and right-handed cutting
SOFT GRIP: Cushioned handle is moulded to the shape of the hand, making sure the lightweight scissors sit comfortably in your hand when used for long periods of time.
Our products are individually tailored to uphold our performance and quality standards, delivering a consistently reliable product that exceeds our customer’s expectations
description: Product Description Korbond Scissors The stainless-steel blades ensure Korbond Dressmaking Scissors stay sharper for longer and remain resistant to rust, making them the experienced crafter’s new favourite tool. From snipping threads to neatly cutting fabric to size, Korbond Scissors use precision ground blades making sure the smoothest and most accurate cut is achieved every time. Precision Ground Blades Precision stainless steel ground blades provide a sharp and accurate finish, preventing pulling or draying of fabric when cutting, and guaranteed to cut right to the tip Ambidextrous Ambidextrous handles offer comfortable grip, suitable for both left and right-handed cutting Comfort Grip The cushioned handle is moulded to the shape of the hand, making sure the lightweight scissors sit comfortably in your hand when used for long periods of time Korbond Precision Dressmaking Scissors are perfect for smooth cutting of a wide variety of fabrics. Precision ground blades provide a sharp and accurate finish, preventing pulling or draying of fabric when cutting. Ambidextrous handles offer comfort grip, suitable for both left and right handed cutting.
